title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 215.246 - Grants or loans not awarded without implementation of certain oversight procedures (Kansas City)
text:
215.246.  Grants or loans not awarded without implementation of certain oversight procedures (Kansas City). — Beginning July 1, 2006, the commission shall not award grants or loans to any home rule city with more than four hundred thousand inhabitants and located in more than one county unless the governing body of such city has implemented oversight procedures to review expenditures and development plans for all housing contracts in excess of one hundred thousand dollars.
(L. 2005 H.B. 58 merged with S.B. 210)
